description: Loft is a Brazilian real-estate platform. Its public developer docs describe integrations for Loft's rental guarantee workflows, including proposal management and lead ingestion.
summary: Loft exposes two documented REST APIs under its Rental Guarantee product (Proposal and Lead Ingestion), both using OAuth 2.0 Bearer tokens, plus a public MCP server at https://gpt-api.loft.com.br/mcp.
